productDisplayName: Nike Men Swift FG Blue Sports Shoes
description: Enhance the power of the soccer player in you with this Firm Ground nike Swift shoe. Created using PVC-free leather and lightweight conical studs, it's a great buy for the winner.UpperSoft, flexible PVC-free household synthetic leather upperLacing system for a supportive Fit and to lock the foot in place Meshed and padded inner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortSmooth rounded toe region for better ball feelMidsolePU midsole for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced impact protectionHigh density, die-cut reused Avoi sockliner for all-day comfortOutsoleLightweight TPU denture with conical studs on the ball of the foot for absolute grip and traction on firm groundsBladed studs on the heel for optimum grip and reduction in stud pressureShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
